title.en: Python CI Pipeline: Lint, Test, Deploy
title.ta: Python CI Pipeline: Lint, Test, Deploy

description.en: Build a complete Python CI pipeline with linting (flake8/ruff), testing (pytest with coverage), matrix testing across Python versions, and deployment steps.
description.ta: linting (flake8/ruff), testing (pytest with coverage), matrix testing, மற்றும் deployment steps-உடன் முழுமையான Python CI pipeline உருவாக்குங்கள்.

story_variants.en:
## Vaathiyaar's Quality Control Line

Vaathiyaar draws three checkpoints on the board. "Your code goes through three gates before it reaches users. Gate 1: Lint — is the code clean? Gate 2: Test — does it work? Gate 3: Deploy — ship it. If any gate fails, the line stops."

### Gate 1: Linting
- **flake8** — PEP 8 style checker
- **ruff** — blazing fast linter (Rust-based)
- **black** — opinionated code formatter
- **isort** — sort imports automatically

### Gate 2: Testing with Coverage
```yaml
- run: pytest --cov=src --cov-report=html tests/
```
- `--cov` measures which lines are tested
- Coverage report shows untested code
- Aim for 80%+ coverage on critical paths

### Gate 3: Matrix Testing
```yaml
strategy:
  matrix:
    python-version: ['3.10', '3.11', '3.12']
```
- Test across multiple Python versions
- Catch compatibility issues early

### Secrets & Environment Variables
- Store API keys in GitHub Secrets
- Access via `${{ secrets.API_KEY }}`
- Never hardcode credentials in workflows

> **Key Concept:** A production-grade CI pipeline has multiple stages. Each stage catches different problems. Linting catches style issues. Tests catch logic bugs. Matrix testing catches version incompatibilities.

explanation.en: Name the workflow — appears in GitHub Actions tab
Trigger on both pushes and pull requests
Define pipeline jobs — lint and test
First job: check code quality with ruff
Install ruff — the fast Python linter written in Rust
Run ruff linter on the src directory
Second job: run tests with coverage across Python versions
Only run tests if linting passes — job dependency
Define the matrix strategy for multiple versions
Matrix creates a job for each combination
Test against 3 Python versions — 3 parallel jobs

left.label: Lint FAILING
left.content:
$ ruff check src/
src/app.py:15:1 F401 unused import
src/utils.py:8:80 E501 line too long

2 errors found

right.label: Lint PASSING
right.content:
$ ruff check src/
All checks passed!

$ ruff format --check src/
2 files already formatted.

instruction.en: Write a complete GitHub Actions workflow with: a lint job using ruff, a test job that depends on lint, matrix testing Python 3.11 and 3.12, and pytest with --cov flag.
instruction.ta: ruff-உடன் lint job, lint-ஐ சார்ந்த test job, Python 3.11 மற்றும் 3.12 matrix testing, --cov flag-உடன் pytest கொண்ட முழுமையான GitHub Actions workflow எழுதுங்கள்.

practice_challenges.starter_code:
# .github/workflows/python-ci.yml
name: Python CI

on: [push, pull_request]

jobs:
  lint:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
      # Add ruff install and check steps

  test:
    needs: lint
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    strategy:
      matrix:
        python-version: # Add versions
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
      - uses: actions/setup-python@v5
        with:
          python-version: ${{ matrix.python-version }}
      # Add install and test steps
practice_challenges.expected_output: Complete CI workflow with lint and matrix test jobs

en: Add: run: pip install ruff && ruff check src/
ta: சேர்க்கவும்: run: pip install ruff && ruff check src/

q.en: What does 'needs: lint' mean in a GitHub Actions job?
q.ta: GitHub Actions job-ல் 'needs: lint' என்ன அர்த்தம்?

en: This job only runs after the lint job succeeds
ta: lint job வெற்றி பெற்ற பிறகு மட்டுமே இந்த job இயங்கும்

en: Creates parallel jobs for each combination in the matrix
ta: Matrix-ல் உள்ள ஒவ்வொரு combination-க்கும் parallel jobs உருவாக்கும்

q.en: How do you access GitHub Secrets in a workflow?
q.ta: Workflow-ல் GitHub Secrets-ஐ எப்படி access செய்வீர்கள்?
